title: Image Signing & Supply Chain Security (Cosign/Trivy)
description: Implement image signing and verification using tools like Cosign to enhance supply chain security. Architect admission gates that only permit deployment of cryptographically verified and vulnerability-scanned images.
objectives: Implement image signing and verification using tools like Cosign to enhance supply chain security.
Architect admission gates that only permit deployment of cryptographically verified and vulnerability-scanned images.
